name: Pre-existing poor SEO—can I still win an AEO lawsuit?
description: Yes if breach proven, despite prior SEO.[1] Prove incremental harm.

mainEntity.name: Pre-existing poor SEO—can I still win an AEO lawsuit?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes if breach proven, despite prior SEO.[1] Prove incremental harm.
acceptedAnswer.description:
**Yes, if agency guaranteed improvements or breached specific terms, pre-existing issues may not bar claims.** Causation key.[1]

Courts apportion fault; disclose baselines upfront.[1] Relevant in Philadelphia.

**Key factors:**
- Contract scope clear?
- They worsened it?
- Disclosed SEO state.
- Damages incremental.

Expert audit pre/post. Strong disclosure weakens defenses.
